---
title: "Welcome"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

source("R/setup.R")
```

Welcome to the Brazos County Notifiable Diseases Dashboard. This website serves as a central hub for summaries of notifiable conditions in Brazos County. Use the navigation bar to explore disease-specific geographic distributions and time-trends.

## Quick Links

Navigate to the Brazos County Health District Website <strong> <a href="https://health.brazoscountytx.gov/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"> here </a> </strong>.
